title: Pesticides and pest management reports and publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Pesticides and pest management reports and publications
- Corporate Plans and Reports
- Decisions and Updates
- Fact Sheets and Other Resources
- Policies and Guidelines
- Education and Training Materials

## Subscribe for Updates - RSS Feed
View all Health Canada RSS Feeds
Health Canada's Pest Management Regulatory Agency (PMRA) invites you to subscribe to the Pesticides and Pest Management RSS feed .
All new publications, including regulatory documents, fact sheets and other important updates related to pesticide regulation predominantly published by the PMRA will be posted by this RSS feed.
Pesticides and Pest Management RSS feed URL: https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/hc-sc/migration/hc-sc/rss/cps-spc/pest-eng.xml.
- Please note that certain browsers require additional extensions to properly view RSS feeds. Accessing RSS feeds without the proper extensions can yield unreadable results. It is recommended to use RSS feeds in combination with an RSS Reader whether online or locally installed. For more information, please visit this page on RSS Feeds .
To view one of the RSS feeds online in your RSS Reader/Aggregator:
- Copy the URL link(s).
- Paste the URL link(s) into your reader.
To receive email notices through an email RSS service:
- Copy the URL link(s).
- Paste the URL link(s) into the email subscription page.
